touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Rowan Scott at PixelMint. No answer, left voicemail introducing our pipeline visibility solution.
LinkedIn message to Rowan Scott mentioning pipeline visibility challenges for revenue teams. Rowan responded expressing interest in learning more about how we differ from their current tools.

questions_asked.question: What makes your approach different from what's already out there?
questions_asked.answer: We focus on real-time deal intelligence with automated scoring, not just call recording. Happy to show you in a quick call.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with proposed times for intro call. Rowan confirmed interest and mentioned they're currently evaluating a few solutions including Chorus.

questions_asked.question: How quickly can you show us something relevant to our use case?
questions_asked.answer: We can do a tailored demo within the week once we understand your pipeline visibility gaps.

next_steps: Book discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Sent calendar invite and discovery prep questionnaire. Rowan confirmed attendance and shared that their sales team of ~50 reps struggles with forecast accuracy.

Shared case study on forecast accuracy improvement with similar-sized revenue teams. Rowan acknowledged and mentioned they're under pressure from leadership to improve pipeline predictability this quarter.
Pre-call reminder email with agenda. Rowan confirmed and asked if we could include time to discuss implementation timeline, as they're hoping to have something in place before Q3.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for initial deployment, depending on integrations. We'll cover this in detail tomorrow.

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Rowan Scott (Head of Sales). Discussed current challenges with pipeline visibility and forecast accuracy. Rowan mentioned they're using Chorus for call recording but lack actionable deal-level insights. Team of 48 sellers struggles to prioritize deals. Rowan is champion, mentioned Harper Goldberg (SVP Revenue) as exec sponsor.

questions_asked.question: How does your solution integrate with Salesforce and our existing stack?
questions_asked.answer: Native Salesforce integration, pulls data in real-time. Also integrates with email, calendar, and conversation intelligence tools.

questions_asked.question: What kind of ROI have similar companies seen?
questions_asked.answer: Typical customers see 15-20% improvement in forecast accuracy and 10-15% reduction in sales cycle length within 6 months.

next_steps: Send demo invite for next week
Include Harper Goldberg in next meeting

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email summarizing discovery call takeaways and proposing demo for next Thursday with broader team. Rowan confirmed and will bring Harper Goldberg and a few technical evaluators from sales ops and IT.
next_steps: Demo scheduled for next Thursday with expanded team

touches.ai_summary: Pre-demo email with agenda and requested attendee list confirmation. Rowan confirmed Harper Goldberg, Jude Friedman (Account Manager), Valentina Morgan (IT Director), and two end users will attend.

Product demo with Rowan Scott, Harper Goldberg (SVP Revenue), and team. Demonstrated AI-powered deal scoring, pipeline health dashboard, and automated risk detection. Harper asked pointed questions about data security and model accuracy. Team engaged, but Harper noted they need to see technical evaluation results before moving forward.

questions_asked.question: How do you ensure data privacy and security with AI processing our sales conversations?
questions_asked.answer: SOC 2 Type II certified, all data encrypted at rest and in transit. Models run in isolated tenant environments. Full data governance controls available.

questions_asked.question: What's the accuracy rate of your deal scoring model?
questions_asked.answer: 85-90% accuracy in predicting deal outcomes, improves over time as it learns your specific patterns. We'll share validation methodology in technical review.

questions_asked.question: How does this compare to what Chorus offers?
questions_asked.answer: Chorus focuses on conversation intelligence and coaching. We focus on deal-level predictive scoring and pipeline orchestration. Many customers use both as complementary tools.

objections: Need to validate technical claims before committing to pricing discussions
next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation with Jude and IT team

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session with Jude Friedman (Account Manager) and Valentina Morgan (IT Director). Deep dive on API architecture, data model, integration requirements, and model explainability. Jude tested the interface with sample data. Valentina focused on security controls and compliance. Both expressed satisfaction with technical maturity.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the scoring model to our specific deal criteria?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, configurable weightings and custom signal inputs available. We recommend starting with baseline model and tuning based on your historical data.

questions_asked.question: What's required from our IT team for implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Minimal - primarily Salesforce admin credentials and SSO setup. We handle the heavy lifting. Typically 5-10 hours of IT time total.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle model drift and ongoing accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: Continuous retraining on your historical data, quarterly model health reviews included in enterprise plans. Real-time accuracy monitoring dashboard available.

next_steps: Jude and Valentina to brief Harper on technical approval

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email requesting feedback on technical evaluation. Rowan confirmed that Jude and Valentina gave positive reviews and Harper is ready to see proposal. Mentioned budget cycle closes end of quarter, would like to move quickly.
next_steps: Prepare proposal for 48 seats with pricing options

touches.ai_summary: Shared implementation timeline and success metrics framework. Rowan acknowledged and mentioned they're finalizing the decision between us and Chorus, leaning toward us due to predictive capabilities.

questions_asked.question: If we moved forward, could we start implementation before contract signature?
questions_asked.answer: We can begin technical setup during legal review to accelerate go-live, pending MSA framework agreement.

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call prep email with pricing framework overview sent. Rowan requested to include Ryan Clark (Sales Manager) who handles procurement on the call.
next_steps: Proposal call Friday at 3pm with Rowan and Ryan

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Rowan Scott and Ryan Clark. Presented three-tier pricing: $66k ACV for 48 seats with automations plus consulting package. Rowan supportive, Ryan focused on contract terms and asked about discounts for annual prepay. Positive reception overall.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing for annual prepayment?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we offer 10% discount for annual prepay. Can also discuss multi-year terms for additional savings.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the consulting package?
questions_asked.answer: 20 hours of expert consulting for custom playbook development, model tuning, and sales process optimization. Most valuable for faster time-to-value.

next_steps: Ryan to review with procurement and finance

touches.ai_summary: Sent formal proposal document with MSA and order form. Rowan confirmed receipt and said they're reviewing internally with finance and legal. Expects to have feedback within a week.
next_steps: Follow up next week on proposal feedback

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call with Rowan Scott. Finance team pushing back on $66k price point, asking for 20% discount. Rowan is trying to defend the value but under internal pressure. Discussed options to reduce scope or adjust payment terms.

questions_asked.question: Can we reduce the seat count to bring down total cost?
questions_asked.answer: We could start with 40 seats at $55k ACV, but you'd lose coverage for full sales team. Risk missing insights on 8 reps' deals.

questions_asked.question: What's your best price for 48 seats as proposed?
questions_asked.answer: At this volume, $66k is our standard rate. I can offer $63k for annual prepay, but would need VP approval for anything below that.

objections: Finance team budget constraints - looking for 20% reduction from proposed price
next_steps: Get VP approval for additional discount
Rowan to make case internally for value vs. price

touches.ai_summary: Second pricing call with Rowan. Proposed compromise at $60k ACV (48 seats, full package) with annual prepay. Rowan receptive but needs Harper's approval. Discussed ROI projections to strengthen internal business case.

questions_asked.question: Can you provide specific ROI data we can use with our CFO?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, based on your deal volume and current win rate, we project $200k+ in incremental revenue in year one from improved forecast accuracy and prioritization. Will send detailed model.

next_steps: Rowan to present $60k option to Harper

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with Harper Goldberg (SVP Revenue) and Rowan Scott. Harper expressed strong support for the solution's strategic value but wants to ensure pricing is competitive. Confirmed $60k with annual prepay works for budget. Harper committed to moving forward, requested contract by end of week for legal review.

questions_asked.question: What's our path to close before quarter end?
questions_asked.answer: Contract to legal by Friday, target 1-week legal review, signature by April 25th. We can begin implementation planning in parallel.

questions_asked.question: Do you offer executive sponsorship or dedicated CSM at this level?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, enterprise tier includes dedicated CSM and quarterly executive business reviews. You'll have direct access to our VP of Customer Success.

next_steps: Send updated contract at $60k ACV by Friday

touches.ai_summary: Sent updated order form and MSA with $60k pricing for 48 seats, annual prepay. Rowan confirmed receipt and forwarded to legal (Ryan Clark coordinating). Harper and Rowan both expressed urgency to close before month end.

Follow-up on contract status. Ryan Clark confirmed legal review in progress, minor redlines on data processing addendum. Rowan says Harper is committed and expects signature by end of week. Deal tracking to close.

questions_asked.question: Any blockers from legal we should address?
questions_asked.answer: Just standard data processing terms clarifications. Our legal team is responsive and should resolve quickly. No material issues.
